name: Zhuge Jun
page_title: Zhuge Jun 諸葛均 [Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Zhuge Jun was the third son of Zhuge Gui and Zhuge Liang’s younger brother. After the death of Zhuge Gui, Zhuge Liang departed for Yuzhang and Zhuge Jun accompanied him. Zhuge Jun followed Zhuge Liang into service with Liu Bei and became a Colonel. (1)

1) Source: de Crespigny, Rafe, A Bibliographical Dictionary of the Later Han to the Three Kingdoms (AD 23–220).

full_text:
Zhuge Jun 諸葛均
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Jun (諸葛均)was born in Langye. Zhuge Liang’s younger brother, worked his way up in Shu. Zhuge Jun was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom.

BiographyHistoric (Confirmed)
Zhuge Jun was the third son of Zhuge Gui and Zhuge Liang’s younger brother. After the death of Zhuge Gui, Zhuge Liang departed for Yuzhang and Zhuge Jun accompanied him. Zhuge Jun followed Zhuge Liang into service with Liu Bei and became a Colonel. (1)
1) Source: de Crespigny, Rafe,A Bibliographical Dictionary of the Later Han to the Three Kingdoms (AD 23–220).
